title: FLARE: Robot Learning with Implicit World Modeling
title_zh: FLARE：隐式世界建模的机器人学习
abstract:
We introduce **F**uture **LA**tent **R**presentation Alignm**E**nt (**FLARE**), a novel framework that integrates predictive world modeling into robot policy learning.
By aligning features from a diffusion transformer with latent embeddings of future observations, **FLARE** enables a diffusion transformer policy to anticipate latent representations of future observations, allowing it to reason about long-term consequences while generating actions.
Remarkably lightweight, **FLARE** requires only minimal architectural modifications---adding a few tokens to standard vision-language-action (VLA) models---yet delivers substantial performance gains.
Across two challenging multitask simulation imitation learning benchmarks spanning single-arm and humanoid tabletop manipulation, **FLARE** achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming prior policy learning baselines by up to 26\%.
Moreover, **FLARE** unlocks the ability to co-train with human egocentric video demonstrations lacking action labels, significantly boosting policy generalization to a novel object with unseen geometry with as few as 1 robot demonstration.
Our results establish **FLARE** as a general and scalable approach for combining implicit world modeling with high-frequency robotic control.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了**F**uture **LA**tent **R**epresentation Alignm**E**nt（**FLARE**），一种将预测性世界建模集成到机器人策略学习中的新颖框架。通过将扩散变换器的特征与未来观测的潜在嵌入对齐，**FLARE**使扩散变换器策略能够预测未来观测的潜在表示，从而在生成动作时推理长期后果。**FLARE**非常轻量，仅需对标准视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型进行最小的架构修改——添加几个令牌——却能带来显著的性能提升。在两个具有挑战性的多任务仿真模仿学习基准测试（涵盖单臂和人形桌面操作）中，**FLARE**实现了最先进的性能，比先前的策略学习基线高出最多26%。此外，**FLARE**解锁了与缺乏动作标签的人类第一人称视频演示共同训练的能力，仅需1个机器人演示即可显著提升策略对具有未见几何形状的新物体的泛化能力。我们的结果确立了**FLARE**作为一种通用且可扩展的方法，用于将隐式世界建模与高频机器人控制相结合。
tldr_zh: FLARE通过轻量架构修改实现隐式世界建模，显著提升机器人策略性能与泛化能力。
cover_zh: 仅加几个token，机器人就能预知未来？FLARE让策略性能飙升26%
